events.text: Goal!  England 1, Panama 0. John Stones (England) header from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Kieran Trippier with a cross   following a corner.
Armando Cooper (Panama) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  England 2, Panama 0. Harry Kane (England) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the top left corner.
Ruben Loftus-Cheek (England) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  England 3, Panama 0. Jesse Lingard (England) right footed shot from outside the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Raheem Sterling.
Goal!  England 4, Panama 0. John Stones (England) header from the left side of the six yard box to the high centre of the goal    following a set piece situation.
Fidel Escobar (Panama) is shown the yellow card.
Goal!  England 5, Panama 0. Harry Kane (England) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the top left corner.
Goal!  England 6, Panama 0. Harry Kane (England) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Ruben Loftus-Cheek.
Amir Murillo (Panama) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  England 6, Panama 1. Felipe Baloy (Panama) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Ricardo Ávila with a cross   following a set piece situation.
